candidates.why: The only explicit D&A row in the operating section is a generic 'Depreciation' line positioned within the administrative/overhead block after 'Central administration' and before other SG&A-type rows, not within or alongside the selected COGS bucket 'Cost of Revenues/COGS'. With no separate COGS-specific D&A row shown above the financial section, COGS D&A appears embedded in the selected COGS row if applicable, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: No explicit operating D&A row attributable to COGS/cost of revenues is visible in the excerpt.

candidates.why: 'Depreciation' appears as a separate operating line in the same overhead/admin section as the selected XSGA component rows ('Central administration', 'Operating Expenses', and 'Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses'). Because it is presented separately at the same level and was not included in the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows, it should be added separately later to avoid omission.

variables.notes: The explicit operating 'Depreciation' line appears to belong to SG&A/administrative overhead rather than COGS and sits outside the selected XSGA component rows.
